instruction: In ~/Desktop/tasks_board, rename directories by replacing prefix todo_list_ with done_list_ for only Jan_1 and Jan_2. Do not rename backlog_list_Jan_3. Create ~/Desktop/tasks_board/rename_log.txt listing renamed pairs as old->new in alphabetical order.
source: 外部参考来源：Ubuntu Desktop Guide - Rename a file or folder (https://help.ubuntu.com/lts/ubuntu-help/files-rename.html.en)

result.command: done1_ok='false'; [ -d ~/Desktop/tasks_board/done_list_Jan_1 ] && done1_ok='true'; done2_ok='false'; [ -d ~/Desktop/tasks_board/done_list_Jan_2 ] && done2_ok='true'; backlog_ok='false'; [ -d ~/Desktop/tasks_board/backlog_list_Jan_3 ] && backlog_ok='true'; no_todo1='false'; [ ! -d ~/Desktop/tasks_board/todo_list_Jan_1 ] && no_todo1='true'; no_todo2='false'; [ ! -d ~/Desktop/tasks_board/todo_list_Jan_2 ] && no_todo2='true'; expected=$(printf 'todo_list_Jan_1->done_list_Jan_1\ntodo_list_Jan_2->done_list_Jan_2\n'); actual=$(cat ~/Desktop/tasks_board/rename_log.txt 2>/dev/null); log_ok='false'; [ "$actual" = "$expected" ] && log_ok='true'; echo "done1_ok=$done1_ok"; echo "done2_ok=$done2_ok"; echo "backlog_ok=$backlog_ok"; echo "no_todo1=$no_todo1"; echo "no_todo2=$no_todo2"; echo "log_ok=$log_ok"
